schedule.description: Story 1 — Wemby 40 pts, locks in eligibility
Story 3 — Knicks clinch No. 3 East seed
Story 4 — OKC clinches No. 1 seed, best record
Story 5 — East play-in race final day
Story 6 — West No. 3 seed battle final day

stories.title: Wembanyama Plays 40 Points, Secures Award Eligibility — Spurs Win vs. Mavs

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
WEMBY PLAYED THROUGH IT.

40 points. 26 minutes. Rib contusion and all.

Victor Wembanyama just played his 65th game — locking in his MVP, DPOY, and All-NBA eligibility.

The drama is over. The season is saved. #GoSpursGo #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wembanyama postgame: "If I had had 65 [games] before, I would, for sure, not have played."

He played anyway. 40 points. Award eligible.

That's a competitor. #GoSpursGo #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Wembanyama Plays Through Rib Injury, Scores 40, Secures Award Eligibility

stories.title: Lakers 101, Suns 73 — LeBron 28/12 ast, Lakers Secure West Seeding

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron James. 28 points. 12 assists. Blowout win.

Lakers 101, Suns 73. No Luka. Doesn't matter.

At 41, LeBron is still carrying this team into the playoffs like it's nothing. #LakeShow #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No Luka. No problem.

The Lakers just dropped 101 on the Suns without Doncic.

LeBron James has this team READY for the playoffs. West seeding is locked. Let's go. #LakeShow #HoopHeroes

article.headline: LeBron James Posts 28 Points, 12 Assists as Lakers Dismantle Suns 101-73

stories.title: Knicks Clinch No. 3 Seed — New York 112, Raptors 95

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
KNICKS ARE IN.

New York clinches the No. 3 seed in the East — 112-95 over Toronto.

Home-court advantage. First-round locked. The Garden is going to be ELECTRIC in the playoffs. #NewYorkForever #HoopHeroes #NBA

article.headline: Knicks Clinch No. 3 East Seed with 112-95 Win Over Raptors

stories.title: Thunder Win 64th — OKC Clinches West's No. 1 Seed and Best Record

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Oklahoma City Thunder: 64 wins. No. 1 seed. Best record in the NBA.

SGA: 31.1 PPG. 6.6 ast. Back-to-back MVP.

This franchise went from rebuilding to the best team in basketball. Historic. #ThunderUp #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: East Play-In Race — Final Day April 12 Looms

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
East play-in picture entering the FINAL day:

No. 5 Hawks: fighting to hold
No. 6 Raptors: hosting Nets Sunday — must win
No. 7-10: locked into play-in chaos

The SoFi Play-In starts Tuesday, April 14. #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: West No. 3 Seed Battle — Nuggets vs. Lakers on Final Day

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The West No. 3 seed is STILL up for grabs.

Nuggets lead after a 10-game win streak — but Lakers are right behind.

Both teams play Sunday. Winner gets the No. 3 seed. #MileHighBasketball #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: SoFi Play-In Tournament Preview — April 14-17, All on Prime Video

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
The 2026 SoFi Play-In Tournament starts Tuesday.

West: No. 7 Suns vs. No. 8 (Blazers/Clippers) — 10 PM ET
East: TBD — 7:30 PM ET

ALL on Prime Video. Win or go home. #HoopHeroes #NBA
